$comment: Stage 1 (AC01..AC23) + Stage 2 (AC-S2-01..AC-S2-17) + Stage 3 (AC-S3-01..AC-S3-07) acceptance criteria → verification owner manifest. Each AC must have a non-empty owner. 'deferred-PR-2' / 'deferred-PR-3' / 'deferred-post-stage-2' / 'deferred-post-stage-3' are valid markers; the script accepts those as 'mapped'. The Stage 2 block was added during the Stage 2 closeout (spec §19 Rev A.3). The Stage 3 block was added during the Stage 3 closeout (PR #6) to record where each Stage 3 AC is verified after PR #11–#16 merged. Stage 3 follow-ups deferred per docs/stage-3/stage_3_acceptance_closeout.md: GC-SC-01 (S3-FU-09), SC diagram overlay (S3-FU-11), Equipment Duty Check (S3-FU-12), and the validateForShortCircuit() readiness wrapper (carryover from spec §13 PR #4).
